title: Table count returning function used inside other function gives wrong results.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE baz (value INT, description TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO baz (value, description) VALUES (10, 'Ten'), (20, 'Twenty'), (NULL, 'Null Value');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bar) AS inner_count;
key_bug_features: Table count function used within another function
